name: GEK TERNA S.A. Namens-Aktien EO
summary: GEK TERNA S.A. is a Greek construction and engineering group involved in infrastructure projects, energy production, and real estate development. The company undertakes large-scale projects such as highways, railways, and power plants, both in Greece and internationally. TICKER: GEK TERNA S.A. is a Greek construction and engineering group focusing on infrastructure projects, energy production, and real estate development, undertaking large-scale projects in Greece and internationally.
